rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and the cited 2014 article fits that set as one individual paper in the coded corpus. In the provided citing-note evidence, prior-work discussion highlights broad historical-review papers (e.g., Huber et al. 2014), with no indication that this specific multichannel attribution model is used as a theory, method, or benchmark source. With only a bare DOI match and no contextual citation text, this looks like an incidental/listing-style reference.
